asset_name: Star Wars Jedi Temple Low Poly Environment
author: Building Assets Hub
usage_notes: Low-poly Jedi Temple - iconic Republic structure from Coruscant. Tan/bronze architectural design with distinctive spired roofline. Suitable as faction headquarters or special building for Republic. Game-ready topology.
special_notes: Iconic architecture with distinctive spired design
Tan/bronze material palette matches Republic aesthetic
Suitable for faction headquarters or command center structure
Large building asset - may serve as map landmark
Detailed enough for player recognition, optimized for real-time

steps: Click the Download button (requires free Sketchfab account)
Select GLB format (recommended for Unity import)
Save as source_download.glb in this directory
Run: dotnet run --project src/Tools/PackCompiler -- ingest assets raw/sw_jedi_temple_sketchfab_001
